title: Dreamscene Fleece Throw Blanket for Sofa, Ultra Soft Warm Cosy Polar Fleece Blanket for Bed Lightweight Fluffy Large Throws Over Sofa Double Bed Throws, Hot Pink - 150 x 200cm
features: Double Bed Throw: Add a pop of colour and modern flair to your home with the striking hot pink hue, designed to complement any room while brightening up your space with a fun and energetic vibe. Ideal gift for women on Birthdays, Mothers days gifts, Valentines Day gifts, Fathers Days, Christmas gifts for women, Birthday gifts for girls, Boys gifts or a lovely treat for yourself.
150 x 200cm: This large throw blanket provides full coverage for a double bed or sofa, ensuring you stay comfortable and cosy whether you're lounging or sleeping.

Lightweight Yet Warm: Designed for year-round use, this lightweight but warm fleece blanket is perfect for any season, offering warmth without feeling heavy or bulky, making it ideal for both summer and winter months.

Ultra Soft & Cosy Comfort: Made from high-quality 100% polyester with 180gsm polar fleece, this throw blanket provides a luxuriously soft and warm feel, perfect for snuggling up on the couch or adding an extra layer of warmth to your double bed.

Easy Care & Durability: Machine washable at 30°C for effortless maintenance, this fleece throw retains its softness, vibrant colour and durability even after multiple washes, making it a long-lasting addition to your home essentials.
description: Transform your living space with the OHS Fleece Throw Blanket, designed to offer the perfect blend of warmth, comfort, and style. Made from ultra-soft polar fleece, this cosy throw provides a plush, lightweight feel that wraps you in warmth without being bulky. Measuring 150 x 200 cm, it’s perfectly sized to cover a double bed or sofa, giving you ample room to relax, nap, or simply enjoy some quiet time. The vibrant hot pink colour adds a bold and cheerful touch to any room, brightening your décor while offering both comfort and style. Ideal for use year-round, this lightweight yet warm blanket is perfect for cooler evenings or as an extra layer during winter. Plus, it’s machine washable, ensuring easy maintenance and long-lasting softness that holds up wash after wash. Whether you're snuggling up on the couch or adding a pop of colour to your bed, the OHS Fleece Throw Blanket brings luxurious comfort and practical versatility to your home. Brand: OHS Product dimensions: 150W x 200L centimetres Colour: Hot Pink Material: 100% Polyester Special feature: Cosy, Warm, Soft Style: Modern
